paper_title: The Distortionary Effects of Incentives in Government: Evidence from China's Death Ceiling Program
notes: Data prepared by results/1094/prep_data_1094.R from wide-format data_aej.dta.
Treatment: NSNP law adoption, staggered across 19 provinces (2005-2012).
post = I(year > effective_year) — strict inequality, so gvar_CS = effective_year + 1.
12 truly never-treated + 4 with effective_year=2012 (treated after sample) = 16 control provinces.
Unit for panel: provinceind = province x industry (245 units). FEs: provinceind + year + industry.
Small N gap: Stata drops 1 obs during merge that R doesn't. 8% coefficient gap from merge/processing diffs.
